title: Forsaken Music Discs
description:
A resource pack that turns the discs: 5, 11, blocks, mellohi, stal with musics from the roblox game "Forsaken"

Current musics: Creation of Hatred (11), Plead (Blocks), Vanity Slasher LMS (Stal), Slasher Milestone 3/4 (Mellohi), C00lkidd Chase Theme (5)
body:
A resource pack that turns the discs: 5, 11, blocks, mellohi, stal with musics from the roblox game **"Forsaken"**


<details>
<summary>Music Spoiler</summary>

Current musics: **Creation of Hatred (11), Plead (Blocks), Vanity Slasher LMS (Stal), Slasher Milestone 3/4 (Mellohi), C00lkidd Chase Theme (5)**

</details>



**Description and "Now Playing" shows default text in 1.20+ versions**

# Credits
Huge credits to **_[Roblox Forsaken](https://www.roblox.com/games/18687417158/Slasher-Forsaken)_**, make sure to check the original soundtracks on YouTube!

[KeyAfterKey, made Plead and C00lkidd Chase Theme](https://www.youtube.com/@key_after_key)

[kzze3, made Slasher Milestone 3/4 Chase Theme](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JQu3LSk1odo&list=RDJQu3LSk1odo&start_radio=1)

[Exedious made Creation of Hatred](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RoFJA-b8f20)


# Requirements:
**for full Creation of Hatred:**
